old_column.content: import type { RecipeDefinition, SlotRecipeDefinition, SystemRecipeFn, SystemSlotRecipeFn } from "../recipe.types"

new_column.content: import type { RecipeDefinition, SlotRecipeDefinition, SystemRecipeFn, SystemSlotRecipeFn } from "../recipe.types"

old_column.content: export type SlotRecipeRecord<T, K> = T extends keyof ConfigRecipeSlots ? Record<ConfigRecipeSlots[T], K> : Record<string, K>

new_column.content: export type SlotRecipeRecord<T, K> = T extends keyof ConfigRecipeSlots ? Record<ConfigRecipeSlots[T], K> : Record<string, K>

old_column.content: export type SlotRecipeProps<T> = T extends keyof ConfigSlotRecipes

new_column.content: export type SlotRecipeProps<T> = T extends keyof ConfigSlotRecipes

old_column.content: export type RecipeProps<T> = T extends keyof ConfigRecipes

new_column.content: export type RecipeProps<T> = T extends keyof ConfigRecipes
